title: Is Ralph Workflow Right for Your Project? A Decision Guide
deploy_verified: cap production deploy succeeded, puma restarted, live public surface verified OK (HTTP 200)
content_summary: 4-stage decision framework: (1) Is your project autonomous-coding-shaped? (2) Does the team need it? (3) What prerequisites do you need? (4) Where does autonomous coding actually break? Concrete signal tests at each stage. Closes the evaluator content gap — 31 blog posts had comparisons and guides but no standalone 'should I adopt this?' decision framework.

four_questions_answered.what: A decision framework to evaluate whether autonomous coding workflows fit a specific codebase/team
four_questions_answered.who: Developers and team leads evaluating AI coding workflow tools who need a structured decision process
four_questions_answered.why_different: Not a comparison or tutorial — a decision guide with concrete failure-mode analysis and signal tests
four_questions_answered.why_now: Fills the most common organic-traffic intent ('should I use this?') that no existing blog post addressed
